description: Scheduled maintenance tasks with configurable intervals. Tasks run on session start when overdue.

tasks.name: prune-memory
tasks.description: Archive memories older than TTL and compact unenriched auto-captures

tasks.name: rebuild-index
tasks.description: Rebuild the searchable memory index from all memory files

tasks.name: memory-to-skill
tasks.description: Distill recurring patterns from memories into skill updates
